# flashblade_s3_export_policy (Data Source)

Reads an existing FlashBlade S3 export policy by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "flashblade_s3_export_policy" "example" {
  name = "existing-s3-policy"
}

output "s3_export_policy_enabled" {
  value = data.flashblade_s3_export_policy.example.enabled
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the S3 export policy to look up.

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) If true, the policy is enabled and its rules are enforced.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the S3 export policy.
- `is_local` (Boolean) If true, the policy is local to this array (not replicated).
- `policy_type` (String) The type of the policy (e.g. 's3-export').
- `version` (String) The version token that changes on each policy update.
